description: The baggage carousel for an arriving flight has broken down. A ground operations agent must manage the situation.

nodes.task_description: Notify the airport's maintenance team of the breakdown.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reports the issue to maintenance.

nodes.task_description: Make an announcement to passengers at the carousel, informing them of the issue and directing them to an alternate carousel.

expected_outcome.value: Agent makes a clear announcement to passengers.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate with the baggage handlers to move all the bags from the broken carousel to the new one.

expected_outcome.value: Agent ensures all bags are moved to the correct location for passenger pickup.
